Bus Timings

Satwa Bus Station Timings and List of Bus Route 2024

July 13, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

One of the most busiest bus stations in Dubai is Satwa Bus Station. It is more than just a bus stop; it’s a gateway to exploring Dubai.

The station features several amenities, including public toilets, a prayer room, parking facilities, and bicycle parking, ensuring a comfortable transit experience for passengers?.

situated in the bustling neighborhood of Al Satwa, is a key transportation hub in Dubai.

It offers convenient access to various parts of the city, making it an essential stop for anyone navigating Dubai’s public transportation system.

jpg)

Contents

Bus Routes from Satwa Bus Station

The station supports a variety of bus routes that connect to different parts of Dubai. Here are some of the key routes

C01

Connecting Union Square Bus Station in Deira with Al Satwa, this route includes stops at Sharaf DG Metro Station and Gold Souq Metro Station?

32C

Serving the route between Al Qusais Bus Station and Al Satwa, this bus stops at Dubai International Airport and Dubai Festival City?

F11

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

A feeder bus route that connects Satwa with World Trade Centre Metro Station and Emirates Towers Metro Station?

And here is the complete  list of bus routes that operate from Satwa Bus Station in Dubai:- C01 - Airport Terminal 3

  • C09 - Hor Al Anz / Qiyadah Metro Station
  • 7 - Al Quoz
  • 15 - Quoz, Al Khail Gate 2
  • 28 - Lamcy Plaza
  • 32C - Al Qusais Bus Station
  • 55 - International City
  • 88 - Deira City Center Bus Station
  • 93 - Ghubaiba Bus Station
  • 98E - Al Quoz Bus Station
  • F11 - Financial Center Seaside Metro Bus Stop
  • F12 - Wasl Park Terminus
  • F28 - World Trade Centre Metro Station and Emirates Towers Metro Station
  • C26 - Qusais Industrial Area Terminus
  • F55A - Saeed Majid Bil Yoha Masjid
  • X02 - Union Square Bus Station, Deira
  • X13 - Lulu Village
  • C15 - Wasl Park Terminus
  • E304 - Satwa Bus Station

The Satwa Bus Station in Dubai operates 24 hours a day, providing round-the-clock service for various bus routes across the city.

The buses operating from Satwa Bus Station follow a regular schedule to ensure timely service. Sunday to Thursday: Every 8 to 12 minutes, Friday: Every 9 to 16 minutes and Saturday: Every 7 to 12 minutes

This frequent service helps in managing the high passenger traffic and ensures minimal waiting time for commuters## How to Get to Satwa Bus Station

Satwa Bus Station is easily accessible from various parts of Dubai.

Satwa Bus Station is not just a transit point but a doorway to experiencing the diverse and dynamic life of Dubai.

Whether you are a daily commuter or a visitor exploring the city, this bus station serves as a crucial hub in your journey.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 13, 2025.
